fill.description: Fill color applied to every feature path. Overrides item and series colors.

onItemClick.description: Callback fired when clicking on a map shape.

event.name: event
event.description: The event source of the callback.

mapShapeItemIdentifier.name: mapShapeItemIdentifier
mapShapeItemIdentifier.description: The identifier of the clicked map shape.

stroke.description: Stroke color applied to every feature path.

strokeWidth.description: Stroke width applied to every feature path.
